title: Control Plane Profile — signed envelope (SPEC.md §26.2)
description: Every signed object in the ocg-control-plane@1 profile is an in-toto Statement v1 carried in a DSSE envelope. This schema validates the DSSE wrapper. The kind-specific object (connector_attestation, execution_state, etc.) is the DECODED statement's `predicate` and is validated separately against its own schema/objects/<kind>.schema.json — this schema cannot reach inside `payload` because it is base64-opaque by DSSE design.

keyid.description: Producer key identifier; opaque to verifiers beyond lookup.

sig.description: Base64 signature bytes over the DSSE PAE encoding of payloadType+payload.

alg.description: RFC 9964 JOSE algorithm identifier. Producers MUST sign Ed25519 and SHOULD additionally sign ML-DSA-44 (§26.2).

statement.description: in-toto Statement v1 (https://in-toto.io/Statement/v1). `predicate` holds the kind-specific object; validate it against schema/objects/<kind>.schema.json or the top-level workflow-manifest/journal_entry/checkpoint/evidence_bundle_manifest/connector_contract schemas as the kind requires.

payload.description: Base64 encoding of the JCS-canonicalized in-toto Statement (see $defs.statement for the decoded shape).
